title: AI_Outreach_Automation
description: Agentic workflow pipeline for startup detection, data enrichment, and personalized cold outreach. Features human-in-the-loop validation and scalable subagents.

title: Gamified_Job_Tracker
description: Mobile application tracking utility designed to centralize opportunity data and drive accountability via specialized gaming loops. Built iteratively with AI-assisted development.

title: Log_Behavioral_Analysis
description: Processed over 1B rows of raw server logs to build an analysis-ready dataset. Applied sequence mining to extract behavioral signals and clustered users into 8 core archetypes.

title: TERMINAL_CV
description: Terminal-aesthetic personal portfolio. Designed using Google Stitch and implemented natively using Google Antigravity, GitHub, and continuous deployment via Vercel.
